name: Gay Dino Island - Zorathal
description:
🏝Gay Dinosaur Island Survival RPG🏝

「Welcome, traveler, to island of Zorathal! An island where rogue and friendly Dinosaurs both reside.」

Zorathal is an extraordinary island characterized by its unique dinosaur population, an only male inhabitance. Survive, make friends and foes, and dive into the world of Zoarthal in this RPG.
creator: _Merkk
